zh.lifeSummary: 當Marie de BRIENNE於1261年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特馬莫斯波奧蒙吉素-薩特時，她的父親Louis de BRIENNE42歲，母親Agnès de BEAUMONT27歲。她於1283年4月27日之前與Henri III d'AVAUGOUR結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她去世於1329年3月29日在法國布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫吉加普享年68歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

en.lifeSummary: When Marie de BRIENNE was born in 1261, in Beaumont-sur-Sarthe, Mamers, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France, her father, Louis de BRIENNE, was 42 and her mother, Agnès de BEAUMONT, was 27. She married Henri III d'AVAUGOUR before 27 April 1283. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 9 daughters. She died on 29 March 1329, in Guingamp, Côtes-d'Armor, Brittany, France, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marie de BRIENNE est née en 1261, à Beaumont-sur-Sarthe, Mamers, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Louis de BRIENNE, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Agnès de BEAUMONT, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Henri III d'AVAUGOUR avant 27 avril 1283. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée le 29 mars 1329, à Guingamp, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marie de BRIENNE 1261 in Beaumont-sur-Sarthe, Mamers, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Louis de BRIENNE 42 und ihre Mutter Agnès de BEAUMONT 27. Sie hat vor 27. April 1283 Henri III d'AVAUGOUR geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Sie starb am 29. März 1329 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Guingamp, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marie de BRIENNE è nata il nel 1261 nel Beaumont-sur-Sarthe, Mamers, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Francia, sua padre, Louis de BRIENNE, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Agnès de BEAUMONT, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Henri III d'AVAUGOUR prima del 27 aprile 1283. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 9 figlie. Morì il 29 marzo 1329, nel Guingamp, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 68 anni.

ko.Beaumont-sur-Sarthe, Mamers, Sarthe, Pay: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 맘르스 보몽-수-사르테
ko.lifeSummary: Marie de BRIENNE(이)가 1261년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 맘르스 보몽-수-사르테에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Louis de BRIENNE(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnès de BEAUMONT(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1283년 4월 27일 이전 Henri III d'AVAUGOUR(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1329년 3월 29일 프랑스 브레타그니 co츠-드'아모르 길그가프에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marie de BRIENNE nasceu em 1261, em Beaumont-sur-Sarthe, Mamers, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Louis de BRIENNE, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Agnès de BEAUMONT, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Henri III d'AVAUGOUR antes 27 de abril de 1283. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 9 filhas. Ela faleceu em 29 de março de 1329, em Guingamp, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, França, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marie de BRIENNE родилась в 1261 г. в местности бомонт-сур-сарт, мамирс, сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, её отцу по имени Louis de BRIENNE было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Agnès de BEAUMONT, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henri III d'AVAUGOUR перед 27 апрель 1283 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 9 дочерей. Она умерла 29 марта 1329 г. в местности гуингамп, кoтес-д'армор, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marie de BRIENNE nació en 1261, en Beaumont-sur-Sarthe, Mamers, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Francia, su papá, Louis de BRIENNE, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Agnès de BEAUMONT, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Henri III d'AVAUGOUR antes de 27 de abril de 1283. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió el 29 de marzo de 1329, en Guingamp, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 68 años.
